name: Toptal Expert Talent Network REST API
what_it_does: Toptal expert talent network REST API for enterprises to source and manage top-tier freelance engineers, designers, product managers, and finance experts — enabling AI agents to automate talent requests, track engagement status, manage expert matching, and integrate with procurement systems through Toptal's curated expert talent platform serving Fortune 500 companies and leading startups. Enables AI agents to manage talent request management for expert talent sourcing request creation and status automation, handle engagement management for active freelancer engagement tracking and lifecycle automation, access expert profile management for matched expert profile and qualification retrieval automation, retrieve billing management for engagement billing and invoice processing automation, manage team management for multi-expert project team composition and coordination automation, handle timesheet management for expert time tracking and approval automation, access project management for client project definition and expert assignment automation, retrieve matching management for Toptal expert recommendation and matching status automation, manage communication management for client-expert communication thread automation, and integrate Toptal with procurement, HRIS, and project management platforms for enterprise expert talent automation.
use_cases: Sourcing top-tier software engineers and designers for technical project staffing automation agents
Managing active expert engagements and tracking billable hours for contingent workforce automation agents
Integrating Toptal expert talent requests with enterprise procurement for compliant talent spend automation agents
Reporting on expert team utilization and project delivery for workforce analytics automation agents
not_for: High-volume freelance task work at low price points (Toptal is top 3% expert talent with premium pricing; Upwork and Fiverr serve broader task work)
Full-time employee sourcing and ATS (Toptal is freelance/contract expert network; LinkedIn and Greenhouse serve FTE hiring)
Offshore team staffing at scale (Toptal is individual elite freelancers; offshore staffing firms serve team staffing at cost-optimized rates)
best_when: An enterprise or high-growth startup wanting AI agents to source top-tier freelance engineering, design, and finance talent, manage engagements, and integrate expert talent spend with procurement systems through Toptal's curated elite expert network.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE API ACCESS IS RESTRICTED: Toptal API access is for enterprise clients and integration partners; automated public-API assumption creates access_denied for organizations without Toptal enterprise agreement with API access; automated must negotiate API access as part of enterprise engagement. MATCHING INVOLVES HUMAN CURATION: Toptal expert matching is a human-curated process (Toptal's talent team reviews requirements and nominates experts); automated algorithmic-match assumption creates unexpected_delay for matching timelines involving human curation; automated must account for Toptal matching turnaround time (typically 24-72 hours). ENGAGEMENT RATES ARE PREMIUM: Toptal experts command premium market rates (top of market); automated budget-agnostic assumption creates budget_exceeded for projects not scoped for Toptal's premium talent pricing; automated must validate budget before submitting talent requests. TRIAL PERIOD IS STANDARD: Toptal engagements typically include a trial period; automated permanent-engagement assumption creates trial_end_surprise for engagements not managed through Toptal's standard trial-then-extend lifecycle; automated must manage trial period and extension workflow.

auth.notes: Toptal uses OAuth2 for Expert Talent REST API. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ (distributed company). Founded 2010 by Taso Du Val and Breanden Beneschott. Bootstrapped/profitable. Revenue: $200M+ estimated. Products: Toptal Developers, Toptal Designers, Toptal Finance Experts, Toptal Product Managers, Toptal Projects. Top 3% acceptance rate. 10,000+ vetted experts. 40,000+ clients. Industries: fintech, healthcare, e-commerce, enterprise. Competes with Catalant, Andela, and 10x Management for elite freelance talent.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier; enterprise agreement or standard client account required
pricing.paid_tiers: Hourly rates for experts ($60-$250+/hour range); platform fee included; enterprise volume pricing
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Bootstrapped/profitable. $200M+ revenue. Top 3% talent. Hourly + platform fee model.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token; enterprise agreement defines API access levels

known_agent_gotchas: MATCHING IS HUMAN-FACILITATED: Toptal talent matching involves human talent matching team review; automated instant-match assumption creates workflow_wait for engagements where human curation is required before expert recommendations are available; automated must implement waiting state for human matching turnaround

TRIAL PERIOD IS ENGAGEMENT STANDARD: Toptal engagements start with trial period (typically 2 weeks) with risk-free guarantee; automated no-trial assumption creates trial_end_disruption for engagements not tracking trial period expiry and extension requirements; automated must manage trial lifecycle explicitly

TIMESHEET APPROVAL IS REQUIRED: Expert time submissions require client approval before billing; automated auto-approve assumption creates billing_dispute for timesheets processed without client approval; automated must implement timesheet review and approval workflow

EXPERT AVAILABILITY CHANGES: Expert availability for new engagements changes; automated always-available assumption creates match_not_found for expert requests during periods of high demand or specific skill shortages; automated must handle no-match scenarios gracefully

RATE CHANGES REQUIRE AGREEMENT: Any expert rate adjustments require mutual agreement; automated unilateral-rate assumption creates engagement_dispute for rate changes not explicitly agreed through Toptal platform; automated must use Toptal's rate change workflow
agent_readiness.security_notes: Expert talent platform. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US. Expert contractor profiles and engagement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Expert talent network. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US. Elite contractor profiles and engagement data.
